notes: xmlforest constructs a named XML element fragment from a scalar value
xmlforest AS-name route preserves the parser argument alias into XML name selection
xmlcast returns bounded XML document text
xmlcast AS type validates the optional target descriptor argument
xmlexists checks a bounded token/path against an XML document argument
xmlexists PASSING route accepts a query and document argument
xmlattributes emits a safe XML attribute fragment
xmlattributes AS-name route preserves the parser argument alias into attribute name selection
xmlconcat concatenates bounded XML fragments without mutation
xmlconcat expression-list route concatenates bounded XML fragments
xmlcomment emits a safe XML comment
xmlcomment(text) emits a safe XML comment
xmlpi emits a safe processing instruction
xmlpi NAME route emits a safe processing instruction
xmlroot emits a default XML declaration
xmlroot VERSION STANDALONE route emits a controlled declaration
xmlelement NAME route constructs a bounded element and does not alter the XMLELEMENT policy-refusal route
xmlagg concatenates bounded XML fragments for scalar projection evidence
xmlagg ORDER BY route is represented by deterministic preordered scalar arguments
xmltable emits a deterministic descriptor document rather than scanning table rows
xmltable COLUMNS route emits a deterministic descriptor document
unsafe XML comment content refuses with exact invalid-input diagnostic
